risk_title: Political and Governance Risk - High Rating
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High, indicating significant FCV-related concerns affecting the project's operating environment in Ethiopia/Oromia State.

risk_title: Staff Turnover Due to Low Remuneration in Government Context
risk_summary: Elevated risk of key personnel resignations from Project Implementation Units due to low government-determined salaries, constraining project implementation capacity and MRV progress.
evidence_quote: Risk for additional staff turnover remains elevated due to, in part, low remuneration as determined by the government harmonized salary guidelines.

risk_title: MRV Implementation Delays Due to Staff Changes
risk_summary: Changes in MRV staff have constrained progress on monitoring report preparation, which is critical for the first ERPA disbursement, indicating governance/institutional fragility affecting core project functions.
evidence_quote: Due to changes in the MRV staff, progress has been constrained in the preparation of the monitoring report, which will be the basis for the first disbursement from the ERPA.
